auth_method.title: Authentication Method
auth_method.description:
Choose how you want to authenticate with your Philips account.

**OAuth PKCE** — requires opening a browser and using DevTools Network tab to capture a redirect URL. Only works for accounts registered via the **Philips Air+ app**.

**Email + verification code** — simpler: enter your email, receive a code, enter it. Works with both **Philips Air+** and **Philips HomeID** accounts.

oauth.title: Philips Air+ Authentication
oauth.description:
1) Open this login URL in your browser:
{authorize_url}

2) Open DevTools (F12) → Network tab — before logging in.
3) Complete Philips login and authorize the app.
4) Find the `com.philips.air://loginredirect?code=...` redirect in the Network tab and copy the full URL.
5) Paste it into the field below.

data_description.auth_code: Paste the code value from the login redirect URL

select_device.title: Select Device
select_device.description: Choose the Philips Air+ device you want to control

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Philips Air+
reauth_confirm.description: Your authentication token has expired. Please re-authenticate to continue using your Philips Air+ device.

email.title: Philips Air+ Email Authentication
email.description: Enter the email address associated with your Philips account. A verification code will be sent to this address.

email_otp.title: Philips Air+ Verification Code
email_otp.description: A verification code has been sent to **{email}**. Check your inbox and enter the code below.

email_otp_options.title: Philips Air+ Verification Code
email_otp_options.description: A verification code has been sent to **{email}**. Check your inbox and enter the code below.

error.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
error.invalid_token: Invalid access token. Please check your token and try again.
error.no_devices: No devices found. Authentication succeeded but the integration could not discover any devices. Make sure your devices are added to the Philips Air+ app and check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Philips Air+ service.
error.otp_send_failed: Failed to send verification code. Check your email address and try again.
error.otp_verify_failed: Failed to verify the code. Make sure you entered it correctly.

data_description.enable_mqtt: Disable to stop cloud/MQTT activity for this integration
data_description.auth_code: Paste a fresh OAuth code to re-authenticate without removing the integration
data_description.email: Enter your email to receive a new verification code
